changes.value: Add swissarmyhammer-code-context dep to swissarmyhammer-lsp. Store client in daemon, expose via client() method. Convert tokio ChildStdin/Stdout to std types after handshake.
Add LspJsonRpcClient to LspDaemon after handshake
